text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa has done an incredible job in her
first three years of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The world's strongest racer—there isn't a soul
around who thinks it's just a fantasy anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, it's time to depart for the rest of the
world.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spe! Grass! Hasta luego! I'm off to France!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Give 'em heck over there!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Good luck, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Why are you saying bye, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's not a race if you aren't there! After all, it's my
goal to run in international G1 races!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Tradition! Prestige—the peak of the European
racing world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I chuckle and tell her I was just kidding. Of course
I'm going with her. I have to lead El Condor Pasa
to success abroad as well.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Go for it, El! I know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It won't be easy. Your opponents will be even
tougher than in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: On top of that, she might be there. The French champion they say is the best in Europe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But El is stronger, right?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well, to be honest...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: She's stronger than me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Are you gonna be okay? Isn't that
frustrating?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's not about being frustrated or not. I'm just
callin' it like I see it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Her feet never stop their pursuit! They've carried
her across the finish line in tons of big graded
races in Europe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Does that mean you can't win?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Probably not. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...If I were the same El as last year, that is.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You mean...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I hadn't messed up and actually went overseas
right after the Japan Cup, I would have lost.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was just runnin' on talent alone back then. But
not anymore!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Competing with you guys has really honed my
strength.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And I've got my trainer going with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, I've got cheering fans whose
voices carry across the globe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've picked up so many things in the last year that
I can barely carry them all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I put all that together and do my very best...
who knows what'll happen?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know everyone is gonna be hella excited to see
me take that and fight with all I got!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A one-winged condor... When El Condor Pasa ran
off only talent, I could easily see that name
sticking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But things are different now. She's sprouted a
spectacular pair of wings from her battles these
past few years... And now she's taking off for the
world.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass, Spe... I'm gonna get the whole world
pumped!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've already thought of what I wanna say when I
win.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What is that, El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's something my papa told me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: El cóndor puede volar más alto que nadie.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El cóndor pue...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What does it mean?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It means...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The condor flies higher than anyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Speed isn't all that matters... There are way more
awe-inspiring things out there, and I'm gonna
show off all of 'em!
